evals.prompt: Set up an agent hierarchy for a code review workflow with research, planning, and execution phases
evals.expected_output: Agent hierarchy configuration with orchestrator, explore, plan, and execute agents
expectations: Creates plan agent for design decisions
Creates execute agent for code changes
Defines delegation rules (who can spawn whom)

evals.prompt: Visualize the current agent hierarchy and validate that permissions are correctly configured
expectations: Shows tree structure of agent relationships
Indicates permission levels for each agent
Checks that explore agents are read-only
